ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the customer */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "number_of_credit_cards" TEXT /* Number of credit cards held by the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer (e.g., Employed, Unemployed) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "credit_history_length" REAL /* Length of credit history in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the customer (e.g., Bad, Good, Excellent) */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who took the loan */,
  "car_loans" TEXT /* Type of car loans held by the customer */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan taken */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., Active, Closed) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer being assessed */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score based on customer data */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Risk category of the customer (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria defining the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_assignments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_assignments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partitioned_data" (
  "partition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partition entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "partition_name" TEXT /* Name of the partition where data is stored */,
  "data" TEXT /* Partitioned data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit limit entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Assigned credit limit for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_limits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer applying for credit */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Model data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_assignments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_assignments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)
